en: All that dissin' in them songs will get your bro whacked
ko: 그런 노래들로 욕하면 너의 형이 위험해질 거야

en: Now turn that bitch pottin' to them hoes lesbians
Parked outside in this rose truck, bitch, come get in
ko: 이 로즈 트럭에 주차했으니, 빨리 타

en: Bitch, hurry your ass up, I ain't gon' say it again
ko: 빨리 와, 다시는 말 안 할 거야

en: If they searchin' at the door, I'll pay to get it in
Really came from cookin', crack out the pot, nigga
No peace treaty with the ops, nigga
Ask the suckas, we done stepped on they top, nigga
Don't got a FOD, nigga, bitch, get you one
You ain't havin' no motion, better get you some
Check the scoreboard, it's like ten to one
Niggas just out here in the block, we been to that
ko: 우리는 블록에 나와 있어, 그곳에 가봤어

en: Tell a nigga, stop hockin', get your leg back
